angle: Night Shift Hero — After 5 PM Only Clinic
facebook_copy:
Your shift ends at 5. Every clinic is already closed.

Optimum Health & Wellness Clinic is the ONLY facility in Pharr open after 5:00 PM offering DOT physicals, employment drug screens, and occupational health exams.

If you drive a truck, work the refineries, or need a pre-employment physical — you shouldn't have to take a day off work just to get cleared.

We handle it all:

- DOT Physical Examinations (FMCSA-compliant)
- CDL Medical Examiner's Certificates
- Pre-employment & return-to-work physicals
- 5-panel and 10-panel drug screens

Walk in after work. Get cleared. Get back to earning.

No appointment needed. Open evenings.

facebook_copy:
Attention CDL drivers and owner-operators:

Your DOT physical doesn't have to eat up your whole day.

Optimum Health & Wellness Clinic in Pharr offers complete DOT Physical Examinations — including your Medical Examiner's Certificate (Form MCSA-5876) — and we're open after 5:00 PM when every other clinic has already locked their doors.

We also provide:
- DOT 5-Panel urine drug screens
- Breath Alcohol Testing (BAT)
- Blood pressure monitoring and recertification
- Vision and hearing evaluations
- Complete medical history review per 49 CFR 391.41

Whether you're getting your initial CDL physical, renewing your 2-year certification, or need a post-accident drug screen after hours — we've got you covered.

Pull in after your route. Walk out with your DOT card.

No appointment. Open evenings in Pharr, TX.

#DOTPhysical #CDLDrivers #TruckersRGV

angle: Refinery Ready — DISA & Oil Field Compliance
facebook_copy:
Working the refineries or heading to the oil field? You know the drill — no green light, no gate access.

Optimum Health & Wellness Clinic provides the complete pre-access screening package that refinery and petrochemical contractors require:

- Hair follicle drug testing (90-day detection window)
- Urine drug screens (5-panel and 10-panel)
- Breath alcohol testing
- Fit-for-duty evaluations
- Pulmonary function testing (spirometry)
- OSHA respirator medical clearance
- Audiometric testing
- Vision screening

And here's what sets us apart: we're OPEN AFTER 5:00 PM.

You don't have to burn a vacation day or lose a shift just to get your testing done. Come in after work, get screened, and stay on track for your next job site.

The only evening occupational health clinic in Pharr.

Walk in. No appointment needed.

#RefineryLife #OilFieldJobs #PharrTX

In and out. That's how occupational health should work.

At Optimum Health & Wellness Clinic, we don't make you wait all day. You walk in, get your testing done, and walk out — often the same evening.

DOT PHYSICALS:
Complete exam, vision, hearing, blood pressure, urinalysis — plus your Medical Examiner's Certificate on the spot.

DRUG TESTING:
Rapid urine screens with same-day results. Hair follicle, 5-panel, 10-panel — whatever your employer or contractor consortium requires.

EMPLOYMENT PHYSICALS:
Pre-employment, return-to-work, fit-for-duty — with professional documentation ready for your HR department.

And we're the only clinic in Pharr doing all of this AFTER 5:00 PM.

Truckers. Refinery workers. Oil field crews. New hires. We've got every test you need — and we respect your time.

No appointment. Walk in tonight.

angle: New Job, New Start — General Employment
facebook_copy:
New job lined up? Don't let the physical hold you back.

Many employers require a pre-employment physical and drug screen before you can start — and most clinics that offer them are only open 9 to 5. If you're still working your current job, that puts you in an impossible position.

Optimum Health & Wellness Clinic in Pharr solves that. We're open after 5:00 PM for:

- Pre-employment physical exams
- 5-panel and 10-panel drug screens
- DOT physicals for CDL drivers
- Hair follicle testing for refinery and contractor jobs
- Return-to-work and fitness-for-duty evaluations
- TB testing
- Breath alcohol testing
- Rapid results

From trucking companies to refineries to warehouse operations to office jobs — if your new employer needs you screened, we can do it tonight.

No appointment. Walk in after work.

Pharr, TX — The evening clinic that works YOUR hours.

#NewJob #PreEmploymentPhysical #PharrTX
